zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith Dillingham於1578年出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，她的父親William Dillingham Sr.38歲，母親Kathrina Marston36歲。她於大約1599年與Sir John Shatswell在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1673年4月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith Dillingham于1578年出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲William Dillingham Sr.38岁，母亲Kathrina Marston36岁。她于大约1599年与Sir John Shatswell在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1673年4月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Bedfordshire): habitational name, probably from Dullingham in Cambridgeshire, recorded as Dolingeham in 1214 and Dillyngham in 1298, named in Old English as ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people (-inga-) of Dull(a)’.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Judith Dillingham was born in 1578, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, her father, William Dillingham Sr., was 38 and her mother, Kathrina Marston, was 36. She married Sir John Shatswell about 1599, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 April 1673, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith Dillingham est née en 1578, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Dillingham Sr., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Kathrina Marston, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Shatswell environ 1599, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 avril 1673, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 95 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith Dillingham è nata il nel 1578 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William Dillingham Sr., aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Kathrina Marston, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Shatswell circa 1599, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 aprile 1673, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith Dillinghamが1578年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父William Dillingham Sr.は38歳，母Kathrina Marstonは36歳であった。約1599年にイギリスでSir John Shatswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1673年4月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith Dillingham(이)가 1578년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Dillingham Sr.(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kathrina Marston(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1599년 영국에서 Sir John Shatswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1673년 4월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith Dillingham nasceu em 1578, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Dillingham Sr., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Kathrina Marston, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Shatswell aproximadamente 1599, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de abril de 1673, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith Dillingham родилась в 1578 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Dillingham Sr. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Kathrina Marston, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Shatswell около 1599 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 апреля 1673 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith Dillingham nació en 1578, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Dillingham Sr., tenía 38 años y su mamá, Kathrina Marston, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir John Shatswell aproximadamente 1599, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de abril de 1673, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 95 años.
